description_long: This is a compact, canister-style vacuum cleaner with a rounded, two-tone body featuring a prominent red upper section and a dark gray lower section. The main body is mounted on two large, white wheels, allowing for easy movement across flat surfaces. A flexible black hose extends from the top of the body, connecting to a rigid, angled wand that ends in a flat, rectangular floor nozzle. The vacuum's design is streamlined, with smooth, glossy surfaces and minimal external detailing, except for a visible circular port and a possible control button on the top. The wheels are integrated into the body, and the hose is attached at a fixed point, looping upward for ergonomic handling. No visible brand logo or power cord is present, and the dust container is not externally visible.
description: A compact, red and gray canister vacuum cleaner with large white wheels, a flexible black hose, and a flat floor nozzle. The design is sleek and modern, with a smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red and gray body, large white wheel, and the full length of the black hose and floor nozzle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular port, the top of the body, and the looped handle formed by the hose.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other white wheel, the body contours, and the hose extending forward.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the vacuum, the hose attachment point, and the symmetrical wheel placement.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is formed by a looped section of the black hose, positioned above the main body for easy gripping and maneuvering.
attribute_wheel_type: Two large, white, solid wheels with a smooth surface, integrated into the lower sides of the vacuum body.
